text: Mobile app development requires careful planning. Designers prioritize responsive design so apps look good on any device, from phones to tablets. Developers choose between native and cross-platform approaches. Native apps are built for one system, like iOS or Android, offering better performance and smoother features. Cross-platform tools let you write code once for multiple systems, saving time but sometimes affecting speed. Once built, apps must go through app stores, where guidelines and reviews ensure quality. A well-made app balances visual appeal with strong performance, making users happy and encouraging downloads.
